title: The Countdown Tightens
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the countdown tightens, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Countdown Tightens. The bomb’s location and countdown push the Alubarna battle into its final desperate stage. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
